name: Title: Classic French Onion Soup Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. HEAT THE BUTTER IN A STOCKPOT, OVER A MODERATE FLAME.
2. ADD THE ONIONS AND COOK UNTIL GOLDEN OR BROWN AS DESIRED.
3. ADD THE STOCK, BRING TO A BOIL, REDUCE HEAT, AND SIMMER AT LEAST 20 MINUTES.
4. SEASON TO TASTE WITH SALT AND PEPPER.
5. ADD SHERRY IF USED.
6. LADLE SOUP INTO INDIVIDUAL SOUP BOWLS OR GRATIN DISHES.
7. TOP EACH WITH A SLICE OF BREAD.
8. COVER WITH GRATED CHEESE.
9. BROWN UNDER THE BROILER.
10. SERVE HOT.
Variation: Toast the bread under the broiler, top with cheese, pass under the broiler to melt the cheese, and place on top of serving of soup.
